svg.title: CyroPay Ltd ISMS Scope Diagram — ISO/IEC 27001:2022
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the ISMS scope boundary for CyroPay Ltd including in-scope systems, out-of-scope exclusions, and interested parties.

g.text: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 | Assessment Date: June 2025 | UK-based digital payment platform
Multi-AZ deployment · Automated backups · CloudTrail · CloudWatch
Customer & merchant PII · Transaction metadata · Tokenised payment references (no CHD) · Financial records
Stripe (PCI DSS-compliant payment processor) — tokenised references only returned to CyroPay; no CHD crosses ISMS boundary
Explicitly excluded from the ISMS boundary
Governed only to the extent they support in-scope services under supplier risk & contractual controls
